name: Suite Spot Golf
about: Suite Spot Golf is a high-end indoor golf and bourbon entertainment venue featuring eight oversized simulator suites with massive HD screens. The facility utilizes TrackMan technology for advanced golf simulation and offers a full-service sports bar with an extensive selection of over 100 bourbons and 40 beers. It operates with winter hours and is designed as a premium experience for both golf and sports viewing.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Upscale bar with extensive bourbon and beer selection for socializing
Large HD screens with NFL Sunday Ticket for sports entertainment
Spacious oversized simulator suites for group play
High-end golf and bourbon experience in a casual setting

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service sports bar with a food menu
Extensive selection of over 100 bourbons and 40 beers

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch technology with advanced ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs for the simulation experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers a full-service sports bar with an extensive food and drink menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to complete 18 holes varies depending on the number of players and pace of play, but typically ranges from 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, Suite Spot Golf is an adult-oriented venue focused on a high-end golf and bourbon experience.
